edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.310.0042 has been superseded by 2847.310.0043 in v2.
edits.old_text: The purpose of this Work Instruction (WI) is to establish a standardized Lockout-Tagout (LOTO) procedure for maintenance activities on equipment, specifically the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (Asset ID: 2847.310.0042) and the Vertical Turning Lathe (Asset ID: 2847.310.0061). This ensures the safety of personnel and compliance with the Acme Industrial Quality Standard (AIQS).
edits.new_text: The purpose of this Work Instruction (WI) is to establish a standardized Lockout-Tagout (LOTO) procedure for maintenance activities on equipment, specifically the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (Asset ID: 2847.310.0043) and the Vertical Turning Lathe (Asset ID: 2847.310.0061). This ensures the safety of personnel and compliance with the Acme Industrial Quality Standard (AIQS).

edits.rationale: The clause number has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation.
edits.old_text: particularly AIQS 2.3.1, which addresses safety practices.
edits.new_text: particularly AIQS 2.1.6, which addresses safety practices.

edits.rationale: The content of AIQS 3.2.4 has changed in v2, necessitating an update to the citation in the Work Instruction.
edits.old_text: Ensure compliance with AIQS 3.5.2 for proper labeling.
edits.new_text: Ensure compliance with AIQS 3.2.4 for proper labeling.

edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.310.0042 has been superseded by 2847.310.0043 in v2.
edits.old_text: 2. **Shutdown**: Power down the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (2847.310.0042) and Vertical Turning Lathe (2847.310.0061) using the main control panel. Follow the shutdown procedures outlined in AIQS 3.1.1.
edits.new_text: 2. **Shutdown**: Power down the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (2847.310.0043) and Vertical Turning Lathe (2847.310.0061) using the main control panel. Follow the shutdown procedures outlined in AIQS 3.1.1.
